description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building set within a walled property, featuring a mix of open green lawns, landscaped gardens, and paved walkways. The structure includes multiple rooms, a covered carport, and a spacious backyard with dense tree coverage and outdoor seating areas. The property is divided into distinct zones, including a main living area, a garage, and several outdoor recreational spaces. The roof appears flat with some overhangs, and the exterior walls are finished in a light color, likely stucco or painted concrete. Large windows and glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the interior to the garden. The overall layout is modern and open, with clear separation between private and communal outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with flat roofs, large windows, and a landscaped yard featuring gardens, lawns, and a carport. The property is enclosed by walls and divided into distinct living and outdoor zones.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, carport, and a large central garden with trees and seating areas.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the backyard, dense tree coverage, and the separation between the main house and outdoor spaces.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the extensive garden, outdoor seating, and the back facade of the bungalow with large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the garage, additional green spaces, and the overall layout of the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
